StructurePhase.Reference: Bucher E., Heiniger F., Müller J., Helv. Phys. Acta, v34 p843 (1961)
StructurePhase.Comment: LPF Collection Code: 526337. Sample Preparation: STARTING MATERIALS:Re,Ta. Compound Preparation: arc-melted. Sample annealed at 1523 K, quenched. Article Title: Supraleitung und Paramagnetismus in komplexen Phasen der übergangsmetalle. Wyckoff Sequence: g2 c a. Unit Cell Data Source: Powder Diffraction.

StructurePhase.Reference: Kuz`ma Yu.B., Lakh V.I., Stadnyk B.I., Voroshilov Y.V., Soviet Powder Metall. and Met. Ceramics, v7 p462 (1968)
StructurePhase.Comment: LPF Collection Code: 457501. Sample Preparation: STARTING MATERIALS:Re,Zr. Compound Preparation: arc-melted. CRUCIBLE: copper hearth. ATMOSPHERE: argon. Sample annealed at 1773 K for 100 h under vacuum, furnace-cooled. Article Title: PHASE EQUILIBRIA IN THE SYSTEMS Zr-Re-B AND W-Re-B. Wyckoff Sequence: h f a. Unit Cell Data Source: Powder Diffraction.
